variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 67704 Special Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 656G25S000P
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 67704. This part is designed to meet high-performance standards, offering reliability and durability across a wide range of applications. Manufactured with precision and quality materials, it ensures optimal compatibility and functionality within your system, helping to maintain efficiency and extend the lifespan of your equipment. Whether used as part of a filtration system, hydraulic setup, or general machinery, this component delivers consistent performance under demanding conditions. Its robust construction and dependable design make it a trusted choice for maintaining system integrity and reducing downtime.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ

variants.title: Filtrec WT1839 Special Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 656G25S000P
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WT1839. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WT1839 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ

variants.title: MicroFit® MFHSP81000 UltraGen III Special Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 656G25S000P
variants.description: MicroFit® MFHSP81000 UltraGen III Special Filter. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30166 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MicroFit® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MicroFit® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
